billing_address.description: Billing address. If none provided, current billing address will be selected

customer_reference.description: Optional customer-specific reference for the order

delivery_address.description: Delivery address. If none provided, products will be sent to existing single delivery address

products.description: The products you want to order

salutation.description: Salutation - currently supported values are '1' for 'Mr' and '2' for 'Ms'

AutoTopupRequest.description: Contains a list of ICCIDs and a boolean flag for auto topup

enabled.description: Whether auto topup is enabled for the given SIMs

AutoTopupRequest.title: AutoTopupRequest

reply_timestamp.description: Time in UTC the response was sent

request_timestamp.description: Time in UTC the request was received

subscriber_info.description: The optional subscriber info returned when the 'subscriber' parameter is true

from.description: The first ICCID of the range

to.description: The last ICCID of the range

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code used for the invoice amount

invoice_amount.description: The gross value which this order amounts to, as printed on the invoice

invoice_number.description: Invoice No. - unique alphanumerical identifier for the corresponding invoice

order_number.description: Order No. - the unique numerical identifier for a order

order_type.description: The order type indicates whether this is a first order, additional order or a topup

products.description: IDs and quantity of ordered products

sims.description: SIMs included or affected by this Order

Ordered_product.description: What you want and how much of it
Ordered_product.title: Ordered product

maxQuantity.description: Maximum quantity of product per order

Product_information.description: General information about an ordered product

quantity.description: Quantity of SIM with this product ordered

Product_information.title: Product information

last_status_change_date.description: Last date and time on which this quota was changed, e.g. by purchasing a TopUp

last_volume_added.description: Amount of SMS or data volume which was last purchased for this SIM

peak_throughput.description: The optional throughput in bit/s (only for data quotas)

threshold_percentage.description: Threshold in percentage for which a volume notification will be send

total_volume.description: The total data volume or SMS this SIM has available over its lifetime

volume.description: Currently available Volume, either SMS or data in MB

SIM_Event.description: Information about a Event. Besides the timestamp and the event_type all other values are optional and might not be included in the actual response

alert.description: Boolean flag determining if this event is treated as an alert

event_severity.description: Textual representation of the severity of the event

event_type.description: A description of the event type
event_type.example: Status of SIM changed from 'Issued' to 'Activated'

SIM_Event.title: SIM Event

current_quota.description: Current Quota for this SIM in MB

imei_lock.description: Indicates if SIM is locked to the current IMEI

quota_status.description: Indicates whether more than 20%, less than 20% or 0% of the current quota are still available

SMS.description: SMS to be send to SIM

udh.description: User Data Header encoded has hex-String (optional)

SMS.title: SMS

delivery_date.description: The date and time on which this SMS was delivered

expiry_date.description: The date and time on which this SMS will expire

last_delivery_attempt.description: The date and time on which the last delivery was attempted

retry_date.description: The date and time on which the delivery was retried

sms_type.description: The type information for this SMS

source_address_type.description: Type information about the source address

status.description: The status information for this SMS

submit_date.description: The date and time on which this SMS was submitted

udh.description: User Data Header encoded has hex-String (optional)

Service_request.description: General information about a service request
Service_request.title: Service request

iccid_ranges.description: SIMs included or affected by this order

iccids.description: SIMs included or affected by this order

target_organisation.description: The organisation to transfer the SIMs TO. Required if transferring to a suborganisation.

quota_exceeded_date.description: Date on which the quota has Exceeded.

threshold_reached_date.description: Date on which the threshold of 80% of the quota was reached.

Status_indicating_whether_or_not_the_tre.title: Status indicating whether or not the treshold or the quota has been reached

SubscriberInfo.description: Optional information about the current location

age_of_location.description: Age of the location information in minutes

cell_global_id.description: Contains fields for mcc, mnc, lac and cid

current_location_retrieved.description: Boolean flag indicating if the retrieved location is current

SubscriberInfo.title: SubscriberInfo

Type_definition_for_the_source_address.title: Type definition for the source address

UssdInfo.description: Optional ussd information, only set if the parameter 'ussd' is set to true.

error.description: Optional information if some error occurred

UssdInfo.title: UssdInfo

imei_lock.description: Indicates if SIM is locked to the current IMEI
